item.title: Distributed Tracing
item.description: Overview Problem Statement—Metrics and Logs Metrics and logs—not enough visibility to diagnose issues Metrics High-level view of system health Show when behaviour changes, e.

item.title: OpenTelemetry
item.description: Overview Set of APIs and SDKs to collect and export telemetry Data use to monitor apps: metrics, logs, traces —“three pillars of observability” Led by CNCF Instrument cloud native apps Open source One spec—respected by all vendors Single place to capture telemetry and ship to backend Auto/manual instrumentation Stack References What is OpenTelemetry?
